task_completion.description: Open the quarterly_review.odp presentation in LibreOffice Impress.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress window is open displaying the 'quarterly_review.odp' file.

task_completion.description: Duplicate the original 3 slides twice to create a total of 9 slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide pane on the left side of the Impress window shows exactly 9 slide thumbnails.

task_completion.description: Prepend 'North America - ' to the titles of slides 1, 2, and 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the slide pane thumbnails or main editing view, the titles for the first three slides begin with 'North America - '.

task_completion.description: Prepend 'Europe - ' to the titles of slides 4, 5, and 6.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the slide pane thumbnails or main editing view, the titles for slides 4, 5, and 6 begin with 'Europe - '.

task_completion.description: Prepend 'Asia-Pacific - ' to the titles of slides 7, 8, and 9.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the slide pane thumbnails or main editing view, the titles for slides 7, 8, and 9 begin with 'Asia-Pacific - '.

task_completion.description: Ensure original bullet point content remains intact across the duplicated slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slide contents visible in thumbnails or main view show original text snippets like '4.2M', 'Enterprise', or 'retention' in the bullet points.
The save icon is clicked, a save dialog is confirmed, or the window title bar does not show an asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes after edits are complete.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to duplicate slides and edit text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on slides, using copy/paste/duplicate commands in the GUI, and typing in text boxes, rather than using terminal commands or python scripts to modify the .odp file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely edited the slide titles rather than replacing the file with a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of text cursors, highlighted text, or active text boxes in the slide title areas during the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete and recreate the slides from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The original bullet points and formatting remain visible throughout the duplication and editing process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/quarterly_review.odp. Expected total slide count: 9. Slide titles must be prefixed with 'North America - ' (slides 1-3), 'Europe - ' (slides 4-6), and 'Asia-Pacific - ' (slides 7-9). Original content must remain intact, specifically containing the snippets '4.2M' (Slide 1/4/7), 'Enterprise' (Slide 2/5/8), and 'retention' (Slide 3/6/9).
